title: March 26
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 26''' is the 85th day of the year (86th in leap years). There are 280 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1934|1934]] – [[Norman Reynolds]] is born.
*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[John Morton]] is born.
*[[1950s#1950|1950]] – [[K. W. Jeter]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 109]] published.
*1980 – [[Liang Yang]] is born.
*[[1985]] – [[Keira Knightley]] is born.
*[[1996]] – ''[[Star Wars: Tales from Mos Eisley]]'' published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'' published.
*2002 – ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' released.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 5: Fool's Bounty]]'' published.
*[[2004]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 11]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2008]] – '' [[Knights of the Old Republic 26|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 26]] published.
*[[2010]] – "[[Cat and Mouse]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*[[2013]] – ''[[ART2-D2's Guide to Folding and Doodling: An Origami Yoda Activity Book]]'' published.
*[[2014]] – [[Legacy (2013) 13|''Legacy'' (2013) 13]] published.
*2014 – ''[[Star Wars: Assault Team]]'' released.
*[[2015]] – ''[[Star Wars Rebels: Recon Missions]]'' released.
*[[2019]] – [[Bronco McLoughlin]] dies.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Battlefront II]] Capital Supremacy update released.
*2019 – ''[[Jedi Academy: Revenge of the Sis]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars: Solo Graphic Novel Adaptation]]'' published.
*[[2024]] – [[Star Wars: Dark Droids (TPB)|''Star Wars: Dark Droids'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[The High Republic – Fear of the Jedi 2|''The High Republic – Fear of the Jedi'' 2]] published.
*2025 – [[The Rise of Skywalker Adaptation 2|''The Rise of Skywalker Adaptation'' 2]] published.
<noinclude>
